<header id="title-block-header">

<center>

<h1 class="title">Risorse digitali per l’assiriologia</h1>
<p class="subtitle">Assiriologia sp., a.a.2020/2021</p>
<p class="author">Erica Scarpa<a href="#fn1" class="footnote-ref" id="fnref1" role="doc-noteref"><sup>1</sup></a></p>
<p class="date">19 febbraio 2021</p>
<p class="date">PDF scaricabile <a href="http://erica-scarpa.github.io//assets/pdf/handout.pdf">qui</a></p>
</center>
</header>

<h2 id="databases">Databases</h2>
<p><a href="https://cdli.ucla.edu">cdli</a></p>
<p><a href="http://archibab.fr">ARCHIBAB</a></p>
<p><a href="http://ebda.cnr.it">EbDA</a></p>
<p><a href="http://bdtns.filol.csic.es">BDTNS</a></p>
<p><a href="http://oracc.museum.upenn.edu">ORACC</a></p>
<p>Sullo standard del cdli, vedi <span class="citation" data-cites="ChiarcosEtAl2018">Chiarcos et al. (<a href="#ref-ChiarcosEtAl2018" role="doc-biblioref">2018</a>)</span>. Sull’encoding e le lingue di markup vedi <span class="citation" data-cites="DelFreoDiFilippo2014">Del Freo, Di Filippo (<a href="#ref-DelFreoDiFilippo2014" role="doc-biblioref">2014</a>)</span>, 36. Su EbDA, database relazionali e compresenza di diversi livelli di informazioni, vedi <span class="citation" data-cites="DiFilippoEtAl2018">Di Filippo et al. (<a href="#ref-DiFilippoEtAl2018" role="doc-biblioref">2018</a>)</span>.</p>
<h2 id="ricerca-bibliografica">Ricerca bibliografica</h2>
<p><a href="http://oracc.museum.upenn.edu">OPAC</a></p>
<p><a href="https://www.jstor.org">JSTOR</a></p>
<p><a href="https://vergil.uni-tuebingen.de/keibi/">KeiBi</a></p>

<p><a href="http://ebda.cnr.it/biblio">EbDA</a></p>

<p><a href="https://bibdesk.sourceforge.io">BibDesk</a></p>
<p><a href="https://www.jabref.org">JabRef</a></p>

<ul>

</ul>
<p><a href="https://www.mendeley.com">Mendeley</a></p>
<p><a href="https://endnote.com">EndNote</a> (paid)</p>
<p><a href="https://www.papersapp.com">Papers</a> (paid)</p>
<p><a href="https://www.sonnysoftware.com">Bookends</a> (paid)</p>
<p><a href="https://citationstyles.org">Citation Style Language</a></p>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://github.com/citation-style-language/styles">GitHub repo</a></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://daringfireball.net/projects/markdown/syntax">markdown</a></p>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://www.markdownguide.org">markdown guide</a></li>
<li>per scrivere in markdown: <a href="https://typora.io">typora</a>, ma ne esistono molti altri</li>
</ul>
<p><a href="https://retorque.re/zotero-better-bibtex/">BetterBibTeX</a></p>
<p><a href="https://pandoc.org">pandoc</a></p>
<ul>
<li><a href="https://pandoc.org/installing.html">per installare pandoc</a></li>
<li><a href="https://pandoc.org/try/">prova pandoc online</a></li>
<li>pandoc for academic writing: <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=N31E_NZYQQY">YouTube 1</a>, <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lMIlNsi3eAY">YouTube 2</a></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="markdown">markdown</h2>
<h1 id="h1-heading">h1 Heading</h1>
<h2 id="h2-heading">h2 Heading</h2>
<h3 id="h3-heading">h3 Heading</h3>
<h4 id="h4-heading">h4 Heading</h4>
<h5 id="h5-heading">h5 Heading</h5>
<h6 id="h6-heading">h6 Heading</h6>
<h3 id="horizontal-rules">Horizontal Rules</h3>
<hr />
<hr />
<h3 id="emphasis">Emphasis</h3>
<p><strong>This is bold text</strong></p>
<p><strong>This is bold text</strong></p>
<p><em>This is italic text</em></p>
<p><em>This is italic text</em></p>
<p><del>Strikethrough</del></p>
<h3 id="blockquotes">Blockquotes</h3>
<blockquote>
<p>Blockquotes can also be nested…</p>
<blockquote>
<p>…by using additional greater-than signs right next to each other…</p>
<blockquote>
<p>…or with spaces between arrows.</p>
</blockquote>
</blockquote>
</blockquote>
<h3 id="lists">Lists</h3>
<p>Unordered</p>
<ul>
<li>Create a list by starting a line with <code>+</code>, <code>-</code>, or <code>*</code></li>
<li>Sub-lists are made by indenting 2 spaces:
<ul>
<li>Marker character change forces new list start:
<ul>
<li><p>Ac tristique libero volutpat at</p></li>
<li><p>Facilisis in pretium nisl aliquet</p></li>
<li><p>Nulla volutpat aliquam velit</p></li>
</ul></li>
</ul></li>
<li>Very easy!</li>
</ul>
<p>Ordered</p>
<ol type="1">
<li><p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</p></li>
<li><p>Consectetur adipiscing elit</p></li>
<li><p>Integer molestie lorem at massa</p></li>
<li><p>You can use sequential numbers…</p></li>
<li><p>…or keep all the numbers as <code>1.</code></p></li>
</ol>
<p>Start numbering with offset:</p>
<ol start="57" type="1">
<li>foo</li>
<li>bar</li>
</ol>
<h3 id="code">Code</h3>
<p>Inline <code>code</code></p>
<p>Indented code</p>
<pre><code>// Some comments
line 1 of code
line 2 of code
line 3 of code</code></pre>
<p>Block code “fences”</p>
<pre><code>Sample text here...</code></pre>
<p>Syntax highlighting</p>
<div class="sourceCode" id="cb3"><pre class="sourceCode js"><code class="sourceCode javascript"><span id="cb3-1"><a href="#cb3-1"></a><span class="kw">var</span> foo <span class="op">=</span> <span class="kw">function</span> (bar) <span class="op">{</span></span>
<span id="cb3-2"><a href="#cb3-2"></a>  <span class="cf">return</span> bar<span class="op">++;</span></span>
<span id="cb3-3"><a href="#cb3-3"></a><span class="op">};</span></span>
<span id="cb3-4"><a href="#cb3-4"></a></span>
<span id="cb3-5"><a href="#cb3-5"></a><span class="va">console</span>.<span class="at">log</span>(<span class="at">foo</span>(<span class="dv">5</span>))<span class="op">;</span></span></code></pre></div>
<h3 id="tables">Tables</h3>
<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 9%" />
<col style="width: 90%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr class="header">
<th>Option</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr class="odd">
<td>data</td>
<td>path to data files to supply the data that will be passed into templates.</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td>engine</td>
<td>engine to be used for processing templates. Handlebars is the default.</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td>ext</td>
<td>extension to be used for dest files.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Right aligned columns</p>
<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 9%" />
<col style="width: 90%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr class="header">
<th style="text-align: right;">Option</th>
<th style="text-align: right;">Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr class="odd">
<td style="text-align: right;">data</td>
<td style="text-align: right;">path to data files to supply the data that will be passed into templates.</td>
</tr>
<tr class="even">
<td style="text-align: right;">engine</td>
<td style="text-align: right;">engine to be used for processing templates. Handlebars is the default.</td>
</tr>
<tr class="odd">
<td style="text-align: right;">ext</td>
<td style="text-align: right;">extension to be used for dest files.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</ul>
<h4 id="footnotes">Footnotes</h4>
<p>Footnote 1 link.<a href="#fn2" class="footnote-ref" id="fnref2" role="doc-noteref"><sup>2</sup></a></p>
<p>Footnote 2 link<a href="#fn3" class="footnote-ref" id="fnref3" role="doc-noteref"><sup>3</sup></a>.</p>
<p>Inline footnote<a href="#fn4" class="footnote-ref" id="fnref4" role="doc-noteref"><sup>4</sup></a> definition.</p>
<p>Duplicated footnote reference<a href="#fn5" class="footnote-ref" id="fnref5" role="doc-noteref"><sup>5</sup></a>.</p>
<h2 class="unnumbered" id="bibliografia" class="unnumbered">Bibliografia</h2>
<div id="refs" class="references hanging-indent" role="doc-bibliography">
<div id="ref-Adams1995">
<p>Adams, Douglas. 1995. <em>The Hitch Hiker’s Guide to the Galaxy: A Trilogy in Five Parts</em>. Penguin Random House.</p>
</div>
<div id="ref-ChiarcosEtAl2018">
<p>Chiarcos, Christian, Émilie Pagé-Perron, Ilya Khait, Niko Schenk, Lucas Reckling. 2018. “Towards a Linked Open Data Edition of Sumerian Corpora.” In <em>Proceedings of the Eleventh International Conference on Language Resources and Evaluation (LREC 2018)</em>, 2437–44. Miyazaki: European Language Resources Association (ELRA). <a href="https://www.aclweb.org/anthology/L18-1387">https://www.aclweb.org/anthology/L18-1387</a>.</p>
</div>
<div id="ref-DelFreoDiFilippo2014">
<p>Del Freo, Maurizio, Francesco Di Filippo. 2014. “LiBER: un progetto di digitalizzazione dei testi in scrittura lineare B.” <em>Archeologia e calcolatori</em>, no. 25: 33–50.</p>
</div>
<div id="ref-DiFilippoEtAl2018">
<p>Di Filippo, Francesco, Massimo Maiocchi, Lucio Milano, Renzo Orsini. 2018. “The ‘Ebla Digital Archives’ Project: How to Deal With Methodological and Operational Issues in the Development of Cuneiform Texts Repositories.” <em>Archeologia e Calcolatori</em> 29: 117–42.</p>
</div>
</div>

<p>They can also have multiple paragraphs.<a href="#fnref2" class="footnote-back" role="doc-backlink">↩︎</a></p></li>
